title: Contact the National Pollutant Release Inventory - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the National Pollutant Release Inventory
Environment and Climate Change Canada Place Vincent Massey 351 St-Joseph Blvd. Gatineau, QC K1A 0H3
The information is being collected for the purpose of responding to your query/comments, and to improve our Web Site. Personal information that you provide is protected under the provisions of the Privacy Act .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
